review: It is the worse app I have ever downloaded. Slow, frustrating, maddening.
It used to be responsive and intuitive. Now the app is slow as hell and the UX is garbage.

How is it that one of the biggest chains in the world has an app that needs to be uploaded every time I would like to use it. Then each time I do upload it, it takes 5 mins of jumping through hoops to finally work. Then I am reminded again as to why I don't use that app after all it takes to place an order for the odd time I want a delivery.
unable to process payment.
Horrible update, unable to sign into app since
Doesn't work + points expire now + they raised prices on the app dynamically

actually the worst app i have ever been forced to use. every 2 times i use it i have to fully uninstall and re-install the app. it constantly stutters while loading to the point where ive had 2 orders go through at the same time. it freezes and loads forever frequently as well. Just emberassing
not useable, takes 10+ mins to load

The button to Scan Code for the prize stickers does not work. *And now the Monopoly game doesn't work either. *And I can't scan the code to login at the kiosks. I then get errors if I try to add the receipt details in the app to get the points: I can only enter the day of the purchase even the Help section states up to 7 days, and it claims I can't enter a receipt over $60 but my receipt is only $41.
app not compatible

The app stopped working for me about a month ago. Now when I have an order in my bag I am unable to execute on it because I get a message saying "please check the items in your bag" and I cant bypass this. Tried logging out and reinstalling my app but to no avail.
points should not expire
has never worked for me once. put together a full order and go to pay and it just loads forever. close the app, go somewhere else.
App is barely usable payment system rarely works I think in the past 4 years or more the average succesful orders ive made through this app is about 50% or less
this app doesn't work
good
Haven't been able to use the app for months because it keeps locking on a forever loading screen.
Total garbage. Glitchy to the point of being unusable
World's biggest fast food company can't build a functional app 😂.
trying to change email addresses is screwy, a headache
made a mistake on my email. how can I correct it

they do not give you the option for no ice so you can buy a drink and have 3/4 pure ice. not to mention if you gettrash food from them good luck making a case through this app and this app is also a absolute gong show to use .
I've used it 3 times and it doesn't work anymore..the site just freezes

This app won't accept any payment method I have but the same card works in store just fine. I've tried clearing cache and data and uninstalling the app to no avail. You also can't choose which location to order from despite having several around you. Super frustrating for someone who doesn't have a car.
There is no vegetarian food.Only non-veg is available, vegetarian food is not available.
doesn't work, keeps loading infinitely trying to do anything
460mb of data..... why?
lastest update- you cannot customize ice amount in iced coffee drinks anymore

The app crashed so I deleted it and re downloaded it. Now I can't enter my location so basically the app is useless. I eat here regularly so this pisses me off very much. I have points expiring as well. NOT Effing impressed. I am considering not going to McDonald's because of this. I love burgers so it will be no problem to go to other restaurants. 😤
excellent
doesn't work, hangs on loading when you try to add items to your bag and there is no customer support for the app? terrible... I could design a better app in a weekend...

The burgers taste like hockey pucks for the past couple of years. As a Canadian thats not what we prefer to do with our pucks. The app is useless for a restaurant that no longer sells an edible "product". The CEO of McDonald's calls it product rather then food. Who am I to argue with the person that runs it.
garbage app, never works properly. You'd think a corporation worth $200 billion wouldn't be trash
Can't use a McDonald's gift card on the McDonald's App

Haven't been able to login for weeks. Tried everything. Won't send the login link to my email. Kind of ticked because I have points expiring. I'm a Computer tech, I've tried everthing. checking Spam folder, reinstalling, clearing data and cache. Nothing new was done to my Samsung S10+ phone. Doesn't even allow you to update your password or send phone code because there is no option.

Still one star, now I have to wait for an email every time I want to see the menu, before I can see the menu I have to pick a location on the map and then it loads for a while, it is quicker to drive to Burger King
Barely works. Can't even look at the menu without having to set up an order first. More frustrating than useful at this point.

How a multi billion dollar company just cannot get a simple app to work is beyond me. In the rare instance I can place an order, it never registers as delivered so literal weeks later I cannot place an order because I have one in progress?
best coffee and best delicious food
Claude coded piece of garbage. Been using the app for over 5 years now, but in the last 12 months it has been a complete train wreck. Re-hire your developers, this is pathetic.
broken and unresponsive.
The app is way too laggy
payment never works
extremely hard to use. unresponsive and often results in wrong clicks.
Purchased a new phone.
new update won't let me order
they need to have games to earn money or something like that. And have more information about how to use these app NOT everyone is technically stuff.
Awful. Tried to sign in, prompted email sign in. Clicked the link, won't sign in, can't use my account. Absolute waste of time. Edit: Had to open the link to the app in a new tab for it to work.
takes too long to download
hungry for more...

Used to be able to sign in to my account using my email and password. For some reason they removed this option and they make you have to click a link sent to your email that never works. What a stupid change. I have been locked out of my account for months now and all my points probably expired. Customer service was so unhelpful. All your competitors still have password sign in...Fire whoever made this app and hire me instead. I will build a better app for you
Broken and dead app.

Have you guys fired your good developers? why are my offers all breakfast and delivery options??? why would I want to see offers for breakfast that ends at 11AM when it's 4:45 in the afternoon? why would I choose delivery orders when I'm in my vehicle driving past my closest McDonald's on my way home? seriously? what's the logic behind these unusable offers???
crashes often.
it has full location permissions and won't give me a code when I'm in a McDonald's because it claims I'm not near one. garbage

what a joke. in Edmonton we have to pay for stupid bags. when I select drive-thru I can't select pay for a bag. the. I have to pay at the dam window an extra time. other pick up options I can select a bag.
kicked me out one day and won't let me login i called and tryed everything to try and get the app going its so annoying
fix your app.
Update: May 2026. Trash app. Terrible slow. Buggy. It's just a pain. Please consider building this app from the ground up, using Jetpack Compose, to make it lightweight and better.
Being able to see receipts from order history would be helpful. We can see points history, why not receipts?
Too many payment problems with this app..once an error occurs once..it never resolves and your just stuck in a loop
since update, can't order and pay
I use the mobile app to order because I don't want to wait. i need to reorder after arriving the same store. wonderful experience
this app is useless. always had issues with it but now it doesnt even open. billion dollar company cant make a functional app? no, its intentional, cant be losing pennies to the points program
Fix your app. Some of THE worst user experience, on any app. Insanely restrictive. Only works 10% of the time
foods ok app never works
The worst fast food app I've ever used. The way you have to fight it to simply get it to let you scan your barcode at a restaurant should be a case study in how not to make an app.
Loudmouth drunks from the bar took over the establishment

McDonald's somehow found a way to make their app even worse. Can't check in early anymore to get my order going, making the whole process EVEN SLOWER, as though that were even possible. Desperately waiting for A&W to hit my town so I can abandon this awful brand.
Constantly have issue with order. the android app barely work, the "help" button never works for me so I have to call the support every time I had an isssue.
The app is acting stupid these days and saying stuff's not available when it is
Detritus. Couldn't process either of my cards, google pay, or my girlfriends card. Pointless garbage
app sucks glitches, not loading/working, removing orders after paying for them. its a joke
app errors
won't let you spend your points that you earned without choosing delivery which costs a lot more. garbage app
"problem with payment" errors even after reinstall

After I uninstalled the app every time I play a game on my device the McDonald's app add plays and it gives me the option to close or open the app.So I think the app is still in my files so how do get rid of it.
impossible to connect my account and nothing is working

For me, the biggest gripe except the bugs, is the fact that because I have a Walmart McDonald's a little closer than a standard one, a lot of menu items is not available for delivery except if I order when it's closed so the other McDonald's is chosen by the app. I want my Sham-Rock Milkshake!!! Let us choose the McDonald's we want to deliver from!
awesome
fun
frequently crash lately.
keep saying a restaurant is closed while it isn't. Cannot order when too far away from the restaurant.
salty yummyness

what the hell is wrong with this garbage app? i cant do delivery options? everytime i checkout it says check items in bag. there is nothing wrong with the order and I cant order cause it greys out. FIX IT NOW
it works
waste of time. no where does it say you need to be the one picking up the food with the phone that ordered it. edit #2. I tried to order again and the whole app is down.
Love the hot coffee. points changed... 😞 5 star. I'm Mclovin it! 😍
Absolutely Garbage app. Multiple times changing delivery address mid order and the contact support feature won't work. Leads to food being dropped off kilometers away

bad app. no half or light options, the customize options are double or triple mayo, or none. no drop down or pop up menus, you have to choose from a list long of all possible configurations. ordering a simple item like a medium regular coffee requires careful reading to make sure you're getting the item you want. too many prompts, going to my basket takes like 5 clicks. way too big of a company to have this bad an app.

I can't check out fir delivery orders. i put any items into my cart and I can't check out. the app stalls every time. Ive cleared my history cash cookies, re-download the app every. tried without wifi just mobile date. all the same. it's extremely frustrating.
Was forced to login to app while attempting to get code while placing order. Had to order without code = no points. Not exactly drive thru friendly! H
Put in an order. Pressed Confirm Order and the app said it encountered an error and canceled our order. Tried again. Same result. Worthless app doesn't work.
Too glitches. One day u can make an order online, second u can't. Infinity processing...
i got scammed. I ordered $27 and picked a location near me and the restaurant said "we don't have it" the money was taken out of my account.
waited 30+ minutes for a bagel

I used to love this app but now it's more glitches, WiFi problems which are part of the glitches and recently my points expired out of nowhere even though it said it would expire on the 6th of May 2026, and it's only the 4th. But then I checked on the app and it said May 1st of this year. So I have no clue why the app would give me two different dates for when my points would be expiring.
Stopped working 2 weeks ago. Can no longer place orders. It greys out the order option and just keeps saying "Please check items in your bag".
The app was always buggy and hard to use without problems, but now it doesn't work at all and gets stuck when adding items to the bag.

it doesnt work. reinstalled the app again for the fries offer advertised. waited in line for 10 minutes and then was forced to give app permissions. app still failed to work and i had to cancel my order. edit: i have returned nearly 10 years later to update my review! the app still doesn't work. it gets stuck on a loading screen when you try to pay, and if you try again by restarting the app 10 or 20 times it might work.
garbage app
Issues with app being laggy which prevents me from ordering properly within the app, especially for breakfast. This needs to be remedied. For a 360MB app, it falls short for punctual use.

tried using the app to order and it froze up. tried again at curbside and froze again before it would let me pay. had to get out and go inside to order just to be asked to pay for a bag ... not enjoyable at all!! fix your app .. sigh
I tried multiple times to change the order location. Even when I did mange it, when I placed the order it still changed the restaurant back to Vancouver. I don't live near Vancouver.
app doesn't put order thought

Because your points expire, its just like a gift card with a loop hole. You're reported to BBB. NO ONE SHOULD USE THIS APP OR AVOID shopping at McDonald's. Ontop of quite possibly being the worst app log in features in the world
good until it randomly logs you out and you have to wait hours for a login email that is supposed to take a few minutes at most.
constantly crashing and erasing my orders. wasted so much time on this app only use if in person
Glitchy app - constant problems.
barely loads
Breakfast menu is showing up at 12am and it's not letting me place an order for over a month... One of the richest companies in the world can't even get their app functioning.
I can never get an online order to work and no one working there can ever help me fix the issue. Ridiculous.
This is why people use doordash
Good 👍
terrible service
the application doesn't work. email cannot be verified and when I opent he application, it stays blocked on the loading page.

very functional, but is totally unforgiving once a delivery order is placed. absolutely no options to edit the order. You're unable to improve your tip to attract a Dasher, or cancel your order after three minutes if no one is responding. if you're picking up, no problem. but you're absolutely screwed for delivery.

Former worker here, and just to let everyone know, McDonald's cleaning practices for the rags they wipe the tables they make your food on, is to wash them in bleach, just bleach.. no soap or detergent, but bleach. Which does nothing as it is a sanitizer only and meant to be used in tandem with a soap or detergent. So, you are eating food that has many days worth of grime from the rags that are literally always dirty. I almost got them shut down over it and my friend said nothing changed.
always crashing and hanging
barely functional, freezing and long loading screens for basic actions like going back to the last page
Made me update the app DURING AN ORDER and I had to re-enter the drive thru line
the app freezes, you have to exit it and then go back in, won't let you lick a store to order at. it's nothing but a headache

deleted as it wouldn't let me take food off my order, it kept saying it was off, but when I went back to order it was still there and charging me for it. not worth the hassle for how little we order from here anymore.
Decent when it works, but that seems rare lately. deals have also gone downhill. Such a large company can do so much better.
slow and times out alot when I'm at the counter ordering

App crashes often. And when it does so in the middle of an order, it secretly reverts your pickup location to the nearest McDonald's rather than the one you selected. Surprise!! Also, I, like basically everyone else in the world, order the same thing from the same place every morning. Yet there's no way to save this as a daily routine; you have to manually change the location to your starred location and set your order every single morning. Very stupid.
did the dev team fall on their heads? the app is super buggy now. had to reinstall just to order. edit: several months later, still buggy. stuck on bouncing fries icon. wasted half my lunch break.
very good food
this app is absolutely TERRIBLE. The amount of issues it has is unbelievable. becareful with the glitches & your points too cam sometimes disappear completely.
horrible app. please fix this or delete this. can't even place a delivery order. not acceptable for a company so big. garbage all day.

App will not add anything to my bag. I can order, but adding to bag results in non-stop fries jumping up and down. no errors. reinstalled and got 1 order to work, now same problem. No issues with Skip ordering, it seems, just no points. My simply delete McD app anyway as they reward, just differently.
garbage, always freeze, never works.
employees great
your recent update is the p00p. you make me order for pickup when I'm here, not 5 mins away so when I arrive I'm not waiting 10 minutes like I am now for my order.
Doesn't work, refuses to let me log in to my account
The worst app I've ever used. problems almost every time I try to put a simple order in. I've told managers many times ...they never fix it
your "food" is not healthy and you charge my whole paycheck for a bigmac combo
I don't eat McDonald's lots, usually stop in once in a while to get a treat for my kids when we are going on a trip and I log in to find all the point had expired. over time 🙄

I have to give them credit because they have the best deals of any fast food app. By far. I'm going to choose where I eat fast food based on how little money I can spend so, they get a lot of my money. The app really sucks though, it takes about 25 seconds just to open and there's a huge leg when you tap on anything. It's really strange like the app is from the 90s, meanwhile they have billions of dollars. Hopefully soon they can design an app that reflects that.

Trash app and trash service. The last time I ordered on the app around four AM and went to my local McD, the guy at the restaurant threw a fit, saying they need one to two hours to change menus and that they can't accommodate me; I've already paid. So today, I'll wait until after 4, when the menus are actually changed. Order, payment is processed, guy at the restaurant tells me they never got my order, but money still left my account, and now I once again lost a mcd points rewards (cost 4000)
luv the burgers n the breakfast
worst food app ever.

Terrible. Scamy. Will try to steal your money. No cancel option for pick-up. Was meant to be delivery. App changed it to pick up and to a bad location in a mall downtown. No support from the store. No support via phone. Can't use the app in the mean time to order an actual delivery. Had to go out and order from a location near my house. Paid double and got half the food. Not worth the hassle.

Whenever I try to order items the says Whoops! The payment didn’t work even though it’s not my card because I try different cards. The app is slow and doesn’t work most of the time for delivery, I want my points but I can’t if I use uber….!!
Has been very inconstant, and barely works. It’s barely worked for years. There are ads ad the beginning that can’t be closed, and the app itself is very slow.
Barely works
Slow, buggy app that continually signs me out. Basically the worst app I have ever used.

McDonald’s should give points for wait times. This happens very often these days where you have to pull forward and park. They tell you this after you pay, leaving you no choice. 

This would even things out, especially after having 5-10 minute wait times after paying for your order in drive through.
There have been 4 instances in the last month where I couldn’t load my code to use prior to payment. I even deleted and reloaded but with no result.

Sick awful company that doesn’t respect privacy. You have to give them your location for any deals. No one else does this. I just won’t buy anything then. Like I need another reason to avoid your fascist Trump supporting company.
Started the app and was logged out. When to the login page, entered email and hit continue. Continue was grayed out and the app just froze on that page. Useless app if you can’t login.
App not working since last update. When selection options in an offer (side, drink), there is no button or option to continue. Can’t load any offers into cart. Unusable.

Absolutely horrible I came with my kids to get a ice cream and they served us less then half of what we get from Niagara it was so rushed he was touching the cone with his hands so much and small so 
disappointing we need to fire the man on that shift
One of the slowest apps I've ever used

Works great with pickup orders but for delivery, there’s no option to pick a branch. My first order was cancelled since it ordered from a closed branch. When I reordered, it was the 5th closest McDo—2 locations were 24/7 and only 1.5 km from my place. Wasted a lot of time so will use delivery app instead.

This app crashes every. Single. Time I try to open it. Pathetic a multi billion dollar company spent what feels like $260 on quality testing this app. Horrible. Wish there was an option to give no stars.

When trying to open the app and get your code at the drive thru there are pop ups and when you dismiss the promotions it takes forever or bugs out. Then it take time to load the code. Horrible system design
App is so laggy
Unable to close ads upon opening the app. Options are there, but do not function. Closing the app and reopening only brings up the same or a new ad. App is useless beyond looking at an ad.
From start app to the member page take 1-3 min to load. And sometimes even crush app. Crazy
i can no longer open the app
This app used to be really easy to use and very stable. It no longer works. As soon as I open up the app it shuts down or locks up. Very disappointed.
Laggy to the point of being almost unusable, full of annoying animations.  I’m. Just. Trying. To. Order. Food.  Why does it make my phone so hot?

Billion dollar company but has the slowest app ever. I legit have to stop and wait for the app to load before pulling up to the drive thru, and sometimes it just freezes so I can’t even use my code. Do better 👎
App is slow and glitchy and doesn’t even load half the time

The app always crashes when I’m using it and takes forever to load a screen. There’s a pop up that shows at the start which takes me 5 minutes to close always telling me not to text and drive when I’m never driving. NOW I can’t even open the app, it crashes immediately and I can’t use it. Frustrating.
About 50% of the time the restaurant says my code does not work. I can’t earn or redeem points

1) HAS to know your location, even if you choose pick up location.  That’s excessive tracking
2) logs out every few days, probably unnecessarily. All my other apps don’t log out except with updates and re-in stations.
3) doesn’t accept Apple Pay every time. 

Please fix.
I can’t select pay with Cash on the app so I have to order it inside instead of going to pick it up
L’application crash, gèle sans être capable de l’utiliser. J’ai désinstallé puis réinstallé, mais ça ne fonctionne pas. J’ai fait quelque redémarrage, encore la, rien ne fonctionne
There is no other app as slow as McDonalds.

FIX NEEDED! The app isn't working since the latest update. Cannot load items and get past the second page. Missing button to add to my order, won't let me add reward items as well etc. Crashes and closes a lot. PLEASE FIX IT!
used to work fine but the app needs an update or something. I can’t even complete an order anymore because the app glitches so much it’s literally not an option. Please fix

App used to be so reliable and with good deals! Now is glitchy, I need to open and shut it down like 3 times before being able to browse the menu. It freezes often times. It also gives issues with processing payments… I gotta give credit to mc donalds curstomer care as at least they always refund me and help quickly

Absolutely horrific app. So unbelievably slow, legitimately takes 5 minutes to open. And when it is open it takes 10 minutes to put your order in because it’s so slow. You would think such a large company wouldn’t have an app with such a garbage interface!! Please make some changes!
This app is stupidly bloated and slow. Takes forever to load extremely basic UI, and will often have glitches brick the app.
Very slow now. Doesn’t load code at all

App works good for the most part, I wish you could add any item to something (ie pickles to a Jr. Chicken, not an option to select) also wish there was something so you could let them know when they have made your order wrong.
$3 for a medium iced coffee and they fill it 75%.  Won’t do less ice anymore.  What a scam!!!

Regardless if your on the McDonald’s wifi or data it will trap you on the loading screen. Always will log you out if your account. Constantly will stop you from using Apple Pay when placing an order and the place order button will be there but unusable. Code for ordering hardly ever shows up. This app has been poorly optimized since it was released and has only gotten worse since then, I’ve stopped going to McDonald’s now and will only use the better optimized and fast loading Tim Hortons app which I have never had a single issue with.

Latest update has made the app beyond broken, load the app only for it freeze then crash. Load again and go order section, app crashes again. Can’t even navigate the menu or checkout without it crashing
Meow
An app designed and developed by some uneducated and inexperienced craps.. fully buggy and the app itself loads with unwanted promos which take ages to close… nonsense. Uncivilized…
Good app like it but my QR code never scans neither does my code. I don’t like how you have to pick a location to set an order up but other then that pretty good
the app barely even loads on wifi and good luck with data
Prices are keep me from going back
Support is unhelpful. App keep crashing after checkout
Application lente, bug fréquents, points qui disparaît. C’est de la marde
It’s incredible the level of incompetence that must be happening down at McDonald’s in order to make a glorified coupon clipping app lag so much and make my phone hot
Doesn’t work endless I’m on my phone I usually bring my iPad only and when ordering it just doesn’t work and I have cellar data iPad so they need to fix this
Getting into the app can be laggy as heck, but the points system is fun… not that I go to McDonalds frequently enough for it to add up
open screen and ads take forever to get away
Can you please please make a dumpling needoh happy meal together?
It need a little more time to get ready

Typing this one sentence in their help form took me 75 seconds because of their lag. Scrolling is a nightmare - it goes 1 inch down the screen at a time, then pauses for 3-8 seconds before I can scroll again. I can never get a code to connect points because it shears says I’m nowhere near a restaurant, even when I’m in the drive-thru (and yes location is on). It’s absurd that a company this size would have such a garbage app.

It’s actually insane how a corporation as big as McDonald’s can’t make a functioning app. It is laggy beyond use and won’t connect to internet ever. This review is being written and posted from the same location that the McDonald’s app wouldn’t load from. Embarrassing honestly.

I have never once been able to place an order without the app just freezing or having me start over. I love when I get there and try to enter my parking spot number in the app, just to have it close my order, and when I finally get back to the correct screen, the keyboard lags.

But the nicest thing about the app is that if anything is wrong with your order, you’re out of luck. You can’t get support, there’s not even a phone number or email for the restaurant itself! And when you call the restaurant, no answer.

I’m lovin’ losing money 9 times out of 10 because the order is incomplete. Can’t get a refund, there’s no such feature in this app.

Food delivery services are not great, but at least I can get support and a refund when there’s an issue!

McDonald’s should be ashamed of such a poor app experience.
This app is very slow and unresponsive. Not much else to say
Why can’t you fix the app so it stops lagging?!?! We don’t need so much animation. Just keep it single

Great app, does what you need it to do in an intuitive way.  It would be an easy five stars with a tune up of the launch experience.  It will pop up a warning not to use the app while driving, sometimes multiple times, and the button to close is unresponsive for a moment.  If you’re at the self-service kiosk just looking for your code it’s aggravatingly slow.

Unfortunately Macdonalds cancelled my app while I had 15000 points. Talked to service person had a very difficult time understanding her and so it seems I’m screwed. Thanks corporate America ! Must be a trumpy!
Application tellement lente et compte déconnecte seul
It's not fun having to login again every 2nd day
alot time i had face system lagging fromyour side make your app better running
Un enfant de 5ans ferais un app moins bugger que celle la

For such a giant corporation, this app is garbage. The main screen always has a damn add and reloads right in the middle of ordering. It try’s to load when it’s already on the screen. Makes me re sign in constantly. Do better McDonald’s.


Never stays logged in! Why the hell. How long ago was my last review?
Application se déconnecte très souvent
Buggy , slow , crashes. A lot of the time just doesn’t work at all or logs you out of your account after every update
Besides the food being incredibly unhealthy, I would say my favourite thing about McDonald’s is their point system

McDonalds doesn’t seem to understand that loyalty apps should be quick and easy to use. I’ve been logged out twice in two days, and logging back in isn’t quick because you CAN’T DO IT IN THE APP. 

Also, when will you realize that many people open the app right when they pull up to the ordering speaker. That is NOT the time to answer a customer survey or to stare at an ad for some promotion that you cannot close!
I have to keep uninstalling and reinstalling the app just to get my codes to work. It’s annoying. Fix it please

The app as a whole works fine, some annoying UX elements, but easy to use/order. The biggest annoyance is when you login, they email you a link. On mobile you click it, it loads your browser, redirects to the app, and logs you in. If you go back to your browser, it refreshes the page, redirects you to the app, tries to log you in again, which fails and logs you out 🤦‍♀️. Just use FaceID or code by text. I just want my coffee 😭
Un peu lent
Tried ordering at night and put in my card but it just kept putting up the same screen of it saying “your card is not charged” even though it was. Worst experience I have ever had.
Why the heck do points expire? this is the only restaurant app that points expires.

This app is horrible, it takes forever for the app to load and once it finally does there are multiple pop ups that you have to exit off before you can access you code to collect points. considering the pressure mcdonald’s puts on their employees to decrease drive through time having such a glitchy and slow app makes it a stressful situation for both the worker and the drivers.
Thanks for the good burgers

Every time i go to place the order it says order failed your card has not been charged. Then to make it work i have to delete the app and reinstall it to make it work. Hopefully you guys could fix this.
So much security in logging in. Always wants 2FA and never works in store
I know how to time my own orders for pickup. Always too slow.

L’application est médiocre. Très lente, crash souvent, le logon est complètement stupide, le plus frustrant est que le compte est souvent déconnecté sans raison. After updating to the latest iOS version, Apple Pay no longer works inside the McDonald’s Canada app. I tried multiple cards, restarted the phone, logged out and back in, and tested at different locations — same result every time. Apple Pay still works normally on the in-store kiosk, and rewards/coupons work fine in the app, so this appears to be an app payment compatibility issue rather than a bank or Apple Pay problem. Please fix the mobile payment bug.

The app takes way too long to load, which can be so inconvenient if you’re in the store at the counter and there’s a long line behind you. There’s no reason why the app should take so long to load especially if you’re on Wi-Fi. Also, please bring back sustainable straws something more durable. The paper straws are very inconvenient. They rip, they get soggy, there’s holes and you can enjoy your drink. Please add a “notes” option under customization because some customization doesn’t allow you to fully choose what you want. for example if I wanted light pickles or to select the amount of pickles that I want etc. things like lots of ice or little ice etc. I’d like to be able to type what I want to add for notes and not forced to choose the options from “customize”. please add a “dress like a Mac” option under customizations for burgers. a lot of times I like my burgers dressed like a Mac and I don’t have the option. I have to do it manually, which is ordering extra lettuce and ordering Mac sauce and that can be very messy especially if I’m on the road. It’s a lot more convenient if the restaurant can do that for you. please add pancake syrup or maple syrup to condiments. It’s so frustrating having to ask for it every single time. I would rather being able to select it on the app with my order instead of having to come in and ask for it or ask for it at the drive-through which takes up time and sometimes you can tell that the workers are frustrated having to make more than one trip getting things for your order. We don’t have to pay for extra onions on our burgers but have to pay extra for lettuce. That doesn’t make sense considering most burgers already come with lettuce so why would we need to pay for extra. Also the price of “$1.99” to add ONCE bacon strip is insane. Almost $2 for one strip of bacon? And almost $4 for two strips? One strip usually isn’t  enough to cover the whole burger/ sandwich and the cost of an add on should never be higher than the cost of the burger/ sandwich itself. Please fix the pricing structure for this. McDonald’s is a huge staple in the food industry, fast, easy, affordable pricing. Charging $2-$4 for a strip or two of bacon seems like a money grab instead of tending to your customers needs. Having to pay $.30 per sauce for an order that most ppl use sauce to eat seems unfair. Ie) most people who order nuggets usually dip them in some type of sauce. Every nugget order should come with at least two sauces and charge more if customer needs more than two.
